install_cmds: python -c "import torchvision; torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10('/data/cifar10', train=True, download=True); torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10('/data/cifar10', train=False, download=True)"
python -c "import torchvision; torchvision.datasets.CIFAR100('/data/cifar100', train=True, download=True); torchvision.datasets.CIFAR100('/data/cifar100', train=False, download=True)"
python -c "import torchvision; torchvision.datasets.MNIST('/data/mnist', train=True, download=True); torchvision.datasets.MNIST('/data/mnist', train=False, download=True)"

TORCH_HOME=/data/torch_cache python -c "import torch; names=['cifar10_resnet20','cifar10_vgg11_bn','cifar10_mobilenetv2_x1_0','cifar100_resnet20','cifar100_vgg11_bn','cifar100_mobilenetv2_x1_0']; [torch.hub.load('chenyaofo/pytorch-cifar-models', n, pretrained=True, trust_repo=True) for n in names]"

data_deps.name: torchattacks-data
data_deps.description: CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, MNIST, pretrained chenyaofo CIFAR cache, and RobustBench L2-robust CIFAR-10 checkpoints for torchattacks tasks
